info: Automatically generated model structure log. See accompanying simulation log for more info

capPipe.definition: 0.25 * pi * lPipe * ((phiPipeE**2 - phiPipeI**2) * rhoSteel * cPSteel + phiPipeI**2 * rhoWater * cPWater)
capPipe.formatted definition: 0.25 * pi * lPipe * ((phiPipeE**2 - phiPipeI**2) * rhoSteel * cPSteel + phiPipeI**2 * rhoWater * cPWater)

capAir.description: heat capacity of air in main compartment

capTop.description: heat capacity of air in top compartment - above the screen

rhoAirCap.description: Density of the air used for calculating capacities

capCo2Air.description: CO2 capacity of main compartment - below the screen

capCo2Top.description: CO2 capacity of top compartment - above the screen

fCanFlr.description: View factor from canopy to floor

aPipe.description: Surface of pipes for floor area

pressure.description: Absolute air pressure at given elevation

alfaLeafAir.description: Convective heat exchange coefficient from the canopy leaf to the greenhouse air

epsCan.description: FIR emission coefficient of the canopy

epsSky.description: FIR emission coefficient of the sky

etaGlobNir.description: Ratio between NIR and the outside global radiation

etaGlobPar.description: Ratio between PAR and the outside global radiation

etaHeatCo2.description: Amount of CO2 which is released when 1 Joule of sensible energy is produced by the heat blower

etaHeatVap.description: Amount of vapour which is released when 1 Joule of sensible energy is produced by the heat blower

etaMgPpm.description: CO2 conversion factor from mg m**-3 to ppm

etaRoofThr.description: Ratio between roof vent area and total ventilation area where no chimney effect is assumed

rhoAir0.description: Density of air at sea level

rhoCanPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of the canopy

rhoCanNir.description: NIR reflection coefficient of the top of the canopy

omega.description: Yearly frequency to calculate soil temperature

capLeaf.description: Heat capacity of a square meter of canopy leaves

cEvap1.description: Coefficient for radiation effect on stomatal resistance

cEvap2.description: Coefficient for radiation effect on stomatal resistance

cEvap3Day.description: Coefficient for co2 effect on stomatal resistance (day)

cEvap3Night.description: Coefficient for co2 effect on stomatal resistance (night)

cEvap4Day.description: Coefficient for vapour pressure effect on stomatal resistance (day)

cEvap4Night.description: Coefficient for vapour pressure effect on stomatal resistance (night)

hSoOut.description: Thickness of the external soil layer

k1Par.description: PAR extinction coefficient of the canopy

k2Par.description: PAR extinction coefficient of the canopy for PAR reflected from the floor

kNir.description: NIR extinction coefficient of the canopy

kFir.description: FIR extinction coefficient of the canopy

R.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Table 8.1. Included here to allow for standalone running

rCanSp.description: Radiation value above the canopy when night becomes day

rB.description: Boundary layer resistance of the canopy for vapour transport

sRsSlope.description: slope of smoothed stomatal resistance model

etaGlobAir.description: Ratio of global radiation absorbed by the greenhouse construction

psi.description: Mean greenhouse cover slope (roof panel angle). arctan(3.92 ft rise / 6.84 ft half-span) = 30 deg.

aCov.description: Outdoor-facing cover area (roof + east/west walls + south taper). North wall shared with house is excluded. 74.8 m2.

cHecIn.description: Convective heat exchange between cover and outdoor air

cHecOut1.description: Convective heat exchange parameter between cover and outdoor air

cHecOut2.description: Convective heat exchange parameter between cover and outdoor air

cHecOut3.description: Convective heat exchange parameter between cover and outdoor air

hAir.description: Height of the main air compartment (below screen). No screen present; set slightly below hGh to avoid a zero-volume top compartment.

hGh.description: Mean greenhouse height. Volume/floor = 3614 ft3 / 367 ft2 = 9.85 ft = 3.00 m.

etaShScrCd.description: Effect of shading screen on discharge coefficient

etaShScrCw.description: Effect of shading screen on wind pressure coefficient

aRoof.description: Roof ventilation area. No roof vents present.

cLeakage.description: Greenhouse leakage coefficient. Polycarbonate residential greenhouse is leakier than commercial glass; estimated 3e-4 vs 1e-4 default.

hSideRoof.description: Vertical distance between mid-points of side wall and roof ventilation openings

hVent.description: Vertical dimension of a single ventilation opening

epsRfFir.description: FIR emission coefficient of the roof. Polycarbonate ~0.90 (vs glass ~0.85).

rhoRf.description: Density of roof layer. Polycarbonate ~1200 kg/m3 (vs glass ~2600 kg/m3).

rhoRfNir.description: NIR reflection coefficient. Same as PAR for polycarbonate.

rhoRfPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient. Polycarbonate reflects ~8%; absorbed fraction = 1 - 0.57 - 0.08 = 0.35.

rhoRfFir.description: FIR reflection coefficient of the roof

tauRfNir.description: NIR transmission coefficient of the roof. Slightly lower than PAR for opal twin-wall polycarbonate.

tauRfPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of the roof. From spec sheet light_transmission=0.57.

tauRfFir.description: FIR transmission coefficient of the roof

lambdaRf.description: Effective thermal conductivity. U=3.46 W/m2K (R-1.639 US = 0.289 m2K/W) x hRf=0.006 m = 0.021 W/mK.

cPRf.description: Specific heat capacity of roof layer. Polycarbonate ~1250 J/kgK (vs glass ~840 J/kgK).

hRf.description: Thickness of roof layer. 6 mm twin-wall polycarbonate.

epsShScrPerFir.description: FIR emission coefficient of the whitewash

lambdaShScrPer.description: Thermal heat conductivity of the whitewash
lambdaShScrPer.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Table 8.2 (Netherlands - no whitewash - value is Inf (or very high))

cPShScrPer.description: Specific heat capacity of the whitewash

rhoShScrNir.description: NIR reflection coefficient of shading screen

rhoShScrPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of shading screen

rhoShScrFir.description: FIR reflection coefficient of shading screen

tauShScrNir.description: NIR transmission coefficient of shading screen

tauShScrPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of shading screen

tauShScrFir.description: FIR transmission coefficient of shading screen

epsThScrFir.description: FIR emissions coefficient of the thermal screen

rhoThScrNir.description: NIR reflection coefficient of thermal screen

rhoThScrPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of thermal screen

rhoThScrFir.description: FIR reflection coefficient of thermal screen

tauThScrNir.description: NIR transmission coefficient of thermal screen

tauThScrPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of thermal screen

tauThScrFir.description: FIR transmission coefficient of thermal screen

cPThScr.description: Specific heat capacity of thermal screen

epsFlr.description: FIR emission coefficient of the floor

rhoFlrNir.description: NIR reflection coefficient of the floor

rhoFlrPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of the floor

lambdaFlr.description: Thermal heat conductivity of the floor

cPFlr.description: Specific heat capacity of the floor

rhoCpSo.description: Volumetric heat capacity of the soil

lambdaSo.description: Thermal heat conductivity of the soil layers

epsPipe.description: FIR emission coefficient of the heating pipes

lPipe.description: Length of heating pipes per floor area. No pipe heating present.

etaPad.description: Efficiency of the pad and fan system
etaPad.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Table 8.2 (Netherlands) - no pad and fan

phiPad.description: Capacity of the air flux through the pad and fan
phiPad.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Table 8.2 (Netherlands) - no pad and fan

phiVentForced.description: Total capacity of forced ventilation (exhaust fans). 2 x 2450 CFM = 4900 CFM x 0.000472 = 2.31 m3/s.

phiExtCo2.description: CO2 injection capacity. No CO2 enrichment system present.

copMechCool.description: Coefficient of performance of the mechanical cooling system

hecPasAir.description: Convective heat exchange coefficient between passive heat storage and greenhouse air

pBlow.description: Forced-air heater capacity. Stage 1: 1500 W electric. Stage 2: 21978 W gas furnace (75000 BTU/hr). Total: 23478 W.

pGeo.description: Heat capacity of geothermal heat source

pInd.description: Heat capacity of industrial heat source

pMechCool.description: Electrical capacity of mechanical cooling system

tMechCool.description: Temperature of the cool surface of the mechanical cooling system

parJtoUmolSun.description: Conversion factor of sun's PAR from J to µmol{photons}
parJtoUmolSun.reference: Based on the parameter etaGlobPar of Vanthoor (conversion of global radiation (J) to PAR (µmol), Table 9.1), and etaGlobPar of Vanthoor (Fraction of PAR in global radiation, Table 8.1). Included here for easier modification of the model.

pi.reference: Included here to ensure this constant is parsed correctly regardless of solver chosen.

alpha.description: conversion factor from photons to electrons including efficiency term

theta.description: degree of curvature of the electron transport rate

etaCo2AirStom.description: conversion from greenhouse air co2 concentration and stomatal co2 concentration

cGamma.description: Effect of canopy temperature on CO2 compensation point

cRgr.description: Regression coefficient in maintenance respiration function

j25LeafMax.description: Maximal rate of electron transport at 25°C for the leaf

tEndSum.description: temperature sum where crop is fully generative
tEndSum.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Table 9.1. Note that the unit there is different than the one used here

q10m.description: Q10 value of temperature effect on maintenance respiration

tCanMin.description: Inhibition of carbohydrate flow because of low instantaneous temperatures

tCanMax.description: Inhibition of carbohydrate flow because of high instantaneous temperatures

tCan24Min.description: Inhibition of carbohydrate flow because of low temperatures

tCan24Max.description: Inhibition of carbohydrate flow because of high temperatures

cFruitMax.description: Maximum allowed dry weight of unharvested fruit on the crop in the greenhouse

capGroPipe.definition: 0.25 * pi * lGroPipe * ((phiGroPipeE**2 - phiGroPipeI**2) * rhoSteel * cPSteel + phiGroPipeI**2 * rhoWater * cPWater)
capGroPipe.formatted definition: 0.25 * pi * lGroPipe * ((phiGroPipeE**2 - phiGroPipeI**2) * rhoSteel * cPSteel + phiGroPipeI**2 * rhoWater * cPWater)

epsBlScrFir.description: FIR emission coefficient of the blackout screen

rhoBlScrNir.description: NIR reflection coefficient of blackout screen

rhoBlScrPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of blackout screen

tauBlScrNir.description: NIR transmission coefficient of blackout screen

tauBlScrPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of blackout screen

tauBlScrFir.description: FIR transmission coefficient of blackout screen

cPBlScr.description: Specific heat capacity of blackout screen

thetaLampMax.description: Lamp electrical power per floor area. 1446 W / 34.10 m2 = 42.4 W/m2.

aLamp.description: Lamp projected area per floor area. 34x2ft + 15x4ft T8 tubes = 1.016 m2 / 34.10 m2 = 0.030.

tauLampPar.description: transmissivity of toplight lamp layer to PAR

tauLampNir.description: Transmissivity of toplight lamp layer to NIR

etaLampPar.description: Fraction of lamp input converted to PAR. Estimated for 5000 K broad-spectrum white T8 LED. Calibrate against PPFD measurement if available.

zetaLampPar.description: Photons per joule of PAR output. Estimated for 5000 K white LED; typical range 4.1-4.6 umol/J.

etaLampNir.description: Fraction of lamp input converted to NIR. Low for white LED (most output is visible or convective heat).

cHecLampAir.description: Heat exchange coefficient between the toplights and the surrounding air

cLampOffTime.description: Time between lamp switch off until next lamp switch on

rhoLampPar.description: Reflectivity of lamp layer to PAR

rhoLampNir.description: Reflectivity of lamp layer to NIR

epsLampTop.description: Emissivity of top side of lamp

epsLampBottom.description: emissivity of bottom side of lamp

etaLampCool.description: Fraction of lamp input removed by cooling

zetaIntLampPar.description: Photons per joule in PAR emitted by the interlight

thetaIntLampMax.description: Electrical energy input to the interlights

etaIntLampPar.description: Fraction of lamp electrical input converted to PAR by the interlights

etaIntLampNir.description: Fraction of lamp electrical input converted to NIR by the interlights

cHecIntLampAir.description: Heat exchange coefficient between the interlights and surrounding air

cLeakTop.description: Fraction of leakage ventilation coming from the top compartment (above the screens)

fIntLampDown.description: Fraction of light emitted by the interlights that is directed downwards

k1IntPar.description: PAR extinction coefficient of the canopy for light coming from the interlights

k2IntPar.description: PAR extinction coefficient for light from the interlights reflected by the floor and reaching the canopy

kIntFir.description: FIR extinction coefficient of the canopy for light coming from the interlights

kIntNir.description: NIR extinction coefficient of the canopy for light coming from the interlights

tauIntLampFir.description: Transmissivity of FIR passing through the interlights

vIntLampPos.description: Vertical position of the interlights with respect to the canopy LAI

lGroPipe.description: length of grow pipes per greenhouse floor area
lGroPipe.reference: Katzin 2021, Table 3.1. We assume no grow pipes so these parameters are not important, but they cannot be 0 because the ODE for the grow pipe still exists

aGroPipe.description: Surface area of pipes per greenhouse floor area

phiGroPipeE.reference: Katzin 2021, Table 3.1. We assume no grow pipes so these parameters are not important, but they cannot be 0 because the ODE for the grow pipe still exists

phiGroPipeI.reference: Katzin 2021, Table 3.1. We assume no grow pipes so these parameters are not important, but they cannot be 0 because the ODE for the grow pipe still exists

pBoilGro.description: Capacity of the grow pipe heating system

tSpDay.description: Heating setpoint during day. 58 F = 14.4 C (heating stage 1 on below this).

tSpNight.description: Heating setpoint during night. Same as day setpoint (58 F = 14.4 C).

heatCorrection.description: Correction for temperature setpoint when lamps are on

heatDeadZone.description: Dead zone between heating setpoint and ventilation setpoint. Cooling starts at 82 F = 27.8 C. Zone = 27.8 - 14.4 = 13.3 C.

ventHeatPband.description: P-band for ventilation due to excess heat

rhMax.description: RH threshold for ventilation. Approximates VPD_high = 0.50 kPa at ~22 C (satVp=2644 Pa, vpAir=2144 Pa -> RH=81%).

ventRhPband.description: P-band for ventilation due to relative humidity

tVentOff.description: Distance from heating setpoint where ventilation stops (even if humidity is too high)

ventColdPband.description: P-band for ventilaiton closure due to too cold temperature

thScrSpDay.description: Screen is closed at day when outdoor air is below this temperature

thScrSpNight.description: Screen is closed at night when outdoor air is below this temperature

thScrMaxRh.description: Relative humidity where thermal screen is forced to open, with respect to rhMax

thScrRhPband.description: P-band for thermal screen opening due to excess relative humidity

thScrDeadZone.description: Zone between heating setpoint and point where screen opens due to too high temperature

useBlScr.description: Determines whether a blackout screen is used (1 if used, 0 otherwise)

blScrExtraRh.description: Control for blackout screen due to humidity - screens open and lamps shut off if relative humidity exceeds rhMax+blScrExtraRh
blScrExtraRh.reference: Assuming no blackout screen. Must keep this at a high value so lamps don't switch off at high humidity

lampTimeOn.description: Time of day to switch on lamps

lampTimeOff.description: time of day to switch off lamps

dayLampStart.description: Day of year when lamps start
dayLampStart.reference: Katzin 2021, pg. 119 - lamps are allowed on every day of the year

dayLampStop.description: Day of year when lamps stop
dayLampStop.reference: Katzin 2021, pg. 119 - lamps are allowed on every day of the year

lampsOffSun.description: Lamps are switched off if global radiation is above this value

lampRadSumLimit.description: Predicted daily radiation sum from the sun where lamps are not used that day

lampExtraHeat.description: Control for lamps due to too much heat - switched off if indoor temperature is above setpoint+heatDeadZone+lampExtraHeat
lampExtraHeat.reference: Katzin 2021, pg. 155. Here we do not switch off lamps due to extra heat (Katzin 2021, Chapter 4)

co2SpDay.description: CO2 is supplied if CO2 is below this point during day

heatBufPband.description: P-band for heating from the buffer

mechCoolDeadZone.description: Zone between heating setpoint and mechanical cooling setpoint

tCan.definition: (1/capCan) * (rParSunCan + rNirSunCan + rPipeCan - hCanAir - lCanAir - rCanCovIn - rCanFlr - rCanSky - rCanThScr - rCanBlScr + rParLampCan + rNirLampCan + rFirLampCan + rGroPipeCan + rParIntLampCan + rNirIntLampCan + rFirIntLampCan)
tCan.formatted definition: (1/capCan) * (rParSunCan + rNirSunCan + rPipeCan - hCanAir - lCanAir - rCanCovIn - rCanFlr - rCanSky - rCanThScr - rCanBlScr + rParLampCan + rNirLampCan + rFirLampCan + rGroPipeCan + rParIntLampCan + rNirIntLampCan + rFirIntLampCan)

tAir.definition: (1/capAir) * (hCanAir + hPadAir - hAirMech + hPipeAir + hPasAir + hBlowAir + rGlobSunAir - hAirFlr - hAirThScr - hAirOut - hAirTop - hAirOutPad - lAirFog - hAirBlScr + hLampAir + rLampAir + hGroPipeAir + hIntLampAir + rIntLampAir)
tAir.formatted definition: (1/capAir) * (hCanAir + hPadAir - hAirMech + hPipeAir + hPasAir + hBlowAir + rGlobSunAir - hAirFlr - hAirThScr - hAirOut - hAirTop - hAirOutPad - lAirFog - hAirBlScr + hLampAir + rLampAir + hGroPipeAir + hIntLampAir + rIntLampAir)
tAir.description: Temperature of the air in the main compartment of the greenhouse (below the screen)

tFlr.definition: (1/capFlr) * (hAirFlr + rParSunFlr + rNirSunFlr + rCanFlr + rPipeFlr - hFlrSo1 - rFlrCovIn - rFlrSky - rFlrThScr - rFlrBlScr + rParLampFlr + rNirLampFlr + rFirLampFlr + rParIntLampFlr + rNirIntLampFlr + rFirIntLampFlr)
tFlr.formatted definition: (1/capFlr) * (hAirFlr + rParSunFlr + rNirSunFlr + rCanFlr + rPipeFlr - hFlrSo1 - rFlrCovIn - rFlrSky - rFlrThScr - rFlrBlScr + rParLampFlr + rNirLampFlr + rFirLampFlr + rParIntLampFlr + rNirIntLampFlr + rFirIntLampFlr)
tFlr.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.3; Katzin 2020, Equation A1; Katzin 2021, Equation 7.1

tThScr.definition: (1/capThScr) * (hAirThScr + lAirThScr + rCanThScr + rFlrThScr + rPipeThScr - hThScrTop - rThScrCovIn - rThScrSky + rBlScrThScr + rLampThScr + rIntLampThScr)
tThScr.formatted definition: (1/capThScr) * (hAirThScr + lAirThScr + rCanThScr + rFlrThScr + rPipeThScr - hThScrTop - rThScrCovIn - rThScrSky + rBlScrThScr + rLampThScr + rIntLampThScr)
tThScr.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.5; Katzin 2020, Equation A1 ; Katzin 2021, Equation 7.1 [6]

tTop.description: Temperature of the air in the top compartment of the greenhouse (above the screen)

tCovIn.definition: (1/capCovIn) * (hTopCovIn + lTopCovIn + rCanCovIn + rFlrCovIn + rPipeCovIn + rThScrCovIn - hCovInCovE + rBlScrCovIn + rLampCovIn + rIntLampCovIn)
tCovIn.formatted definition: (1/capCovIn) * (hTopCovIn + lTopCovIn + rCanCovIn + rFlrCovIn + rPipeCovIn + rThScrCovIn - hCovInCovE + rBlScrCovIn + rLampCovIn + rIntLampCovIn)
tCovIn.description: Temperature of the internal side of the greenhouse cover

tCovE.description: Temperature of the internal side of the greenhouse cover

tPipe.definition: 1 / capPipe * (hBoilPipe + hIndPipe + hGeoPipe - rPipeSky - rPipeCovIn - rPipeCan - rPipeFlr - rPipeThScr - hPipeAir - rPipeBlScr + rLampPipe + rIntLampPipe + hBufHotPipe)
tPipe.formatted definition: 1 / capPipe * (hBoilPipe + hIndPipe + hGeoPipe - rPipeSky - rPipeCovIn - rPipeCan - rPipeFlr - rPipeThScr - hPipeAir - rPipeBlScr + rLampPipe + rIntLampPipe + hBufHotPipe)
tPipe.description: Temperature of the pipe rail heating pipe

vpAir.definition: (1/capVpAir) * (mvCanAir + mvPadAir + mvFogAir + mvBlowAir - mvAirThScr - mvAirTop - mvAirOut - mvAirOutPad - mvAirBlScr - mvAirMech)
vpAir.formatted definition: (1/capVpAir) * (mvCanAir + mvPadAir + mvFogAir + mvBlowAir - mvAirThScr - mvAirTop - mvAirOut - mvAirOutPad - mvAirBlScr - mvAirMech)
vpAir.description: Vapour pressure of the air in the main compartment of the greenhouse (below the screen)

vpTop.description: Vapour pressure of the air in the top compartment of the greenhouse (above the screen)

co2Air.description: CO2 concentration of the air in the main compartment of the greenhouse (below the screen)

co2Top.description: CO2 concentration of the air in the top compartment of the greenhouse (above the screen)

cFruit.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.2; Katzin 2021, Equation 7.43. Initial value based on previous versions of GreenLight, assuming 3.12 plants/m2, with each plant 2 g and  fruit fraction 0f 0.05. see https://github.com/davkat1/GreenLight/blob/4ec6018e0aad2775ad11085d34f3886a7b7dd052/Code/createGreenLightModel/setGlInit.m

cLeaf.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.4. Initial value based on previous versions of GreenLight, assuming 3.12 plants/m2, with each plant 2 g and leaf fraction 0f 0.7. see https://github.com/davkat1/GreenLight/blob/4ec6018e0aad2775ad11085d34f3886a7b7dd052/Code/createGreenLightModel/setGlInit.m

cStem.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.6. Initial value based on previous versions of GreenLight, assuming 3.12 plants/m2, with each plant 2 g and stem fraction 0f 0.25. see https://github.com/davkat1/GreenLight/blob/4ec6018e0aad2775ad11085d34f3886a7b7dd052/Code/createGreenLightModel/setGlInit.m

tCanSum.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.8. Note that the unit noted there is different than the one used here

tCan24.description: Average Canopy Temperature in previous 24 Hours

tBlScr.definition: (1/capBlScr) * (hAirBlScr + lAirBlScr + rCanBlScr + rFlrBlScr + rPipeBlScr - hBlScrTop - rBlScrCovIn - rBlScrSky - rBlScrThScr + rLampBlScr + rIntLampBlScr)
tBlScr.formatted definition: (1/capBlScr) * (hAirBlScr + lAirBlScr + rCanBlScr + rFlrBlScr + rPipeBlScr - hBlScrTop - rBlScrCovIn - rBlScrSky - rBlScrThScr + rLampBlScr + rIntLampBlScr)

tGroPipe.description: Temperature of the grow pipe heating pipe

tLamp.definition: (1/capLamp) * (qLampIn - rLampSky - rLampCovIn - rLampThScr - rLampBlScr - hLampAir - rParLampCan - rNirLampCan - rFirLampCan - rLampPipe - rParLampFlr - rNirLampFlr - rFirLampFlr - rLampAir - hLampCool + rIntLampLamp)
tLamp.formatted definition: (1/capLamp) * (qLampIn - rLampSky - rLampCovIn - rLampThScr - rLampBlScr - hLampAir - rParLampCan - rNirLampCan - rFirLampCan - rLampPipe - rParLampFlr - rNirLampFlr - rFirLampFlr - rLampAir - hLampCool + rIntLampLamp)

tIntLamp.definition: (1/capIntLamp) * (qIntLampIn - rIntLampSky - rIntLampCovIn - rIntLampThScr - rIntLampBlScr - hIntLampAir - rParIntLampCan - rNirIntLampCan - rFirIntLampCan - rIntLampPipe - rParIntLampFlr - rNirIntLampFlr - rFirIntLampFlr - rIntLampAir -  rIntLampLamp)
tIntLamp.formatted definition: (1/capIntLamp) * (qIntLampIn - rIntLampSky - rIntLampCovIn - rIntLampThScr - rIntLampBlScr - hIntLampAir - rParIntLampCan - rNirIntLampCan - rFirIntLampCan - rIntLampPipe - rParIntLampFlr - rNirIntLampFlr - rFirIntLampFlr - rIntLampAir -  rIntLampLamp)

Time.description: Time unit used in the model state equations (ODEs)

tauShScrLayerPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of the shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the shading screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)

tauShScrPerLayerPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of the semi-permanent shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the semi-permanent shading screen (whether it is deployed or not)

rhoShScrLayerPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of the shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the shading screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)

rhoShScrPerLayerPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of the semi-permanent shading screen "layer": the vertical area of the screen (whether it is deployed or not)

tauShScrShScrPerPar.definition: tau12(tauShScrLayerPar, tauShScrPerLayerPar, rhoShScrLayerPar, rhoShScrLayerPar, rhoShScrPerLayerPar, rhoShScrPerLayerPar)
tauShScrShScrPerPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer

rhoShScrShScrPerParUp.definition: rhoUp(tauShScrLayerPar, tauShScrPerLayerPar, rhoShScrLayerPar, rhoShScrLayerPar, rhoShScrPerLayerPar, rhoShScrPerLayerPar)
rhoShScrShScrPerParUp.description: PAR reflection coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer towards the top

rhoShScrShScrPerParDn.definition: rhoDn(tauShScrLayerPar, tauShScrPerLayerPar, rhoShScrLayerPar, rhoShScrLayerPar, rhoShScrPerLayerPar, rhoShScrPerLayerPar)
rhoShScrShScrPerParDn.description: PAR reflection coefficient of the shading screen and semi-permanent shading screen combined layer towards the bottom

tauThScrLayerPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of the thermal screen "layer": the vertical area of the thermal screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauThScrLayerPar.reference: Vanthoor 2011, pg. 208 (as above); pg. 208-209: "the last 2 cover layers [...] are calculated analogously to Eqs. (8.16) and (8.17)"

rhoThScrLayerPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of the thermal screen "layer": the vertical area of the thermal screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoThScrLayerPar.reference: Vanthoor 2011, pg. 208 (as above); pg. 208-209: "the last 2 cover layers [...] are calculated analogously to Eqs. (8.16) and (8.17)"

tauRfThScrPar.definition: tau12(tauRfPar, tauThScrLayerPar, rhoRfPar, rhoRfPar, rhoThScrLayerPar, rhoThScrLayerPar)

aCan.description: Surface of canopy per floor area for calculation of FIR exchanges

rPipeSky.definition: fir(aPipe, epsPipe, epsSky, tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * tauCovFir * tauThScrFirU * tauBlScrFirU * 0.49 * exp(-kFir * lai), tPipe, tSky)

rPipeThScr.definition: fir(aPipe, epsPipe, epsThScrFir, tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * uThScr * tauBlScrFirU * 0.49 * exp(-kFir * lai), tPipe, tThScr)
rPipeThScr.description: FIR between pipes and thermal screen

rFlrCovIn.definition: fir(1, epsFlr, epsCovFir, tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * tauThScrFirU * tauBlScrFirU * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe* phiPipeE) * exp(-kFir * lai), tFlr, tCovIn)
rFlrCovIn.formatted definition: ((1) * (epsFlr) * (epsCovFir) * (tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * tauThScrFirU * tauBlScrFirU * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe* phiPipeE) * (np.exp(-kFir * lai))) * 5.67e-8 * (((tFlr) + 273.15)**4 - ((tCovIn) + 273.15)**4 ))

rFlrSky.definition: fir(1, epsFlr, epsSky, tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * tauCovFir * tauThScrFirU * tauBlScrFirU * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE) * exp(-kFir * lai), tFlr, tSky)
rFlrSky.formatted definition: ((1) * (epsFlr) * (epsSky) * (tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * tauCovFir * tauThScrFirU * tauBlScrFirU * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE) * (np.exp(-kFir * lai))) * 5.67e-8 * (((tFlr) + 273.15)**4 - ((tSky) + 273.15)**4 ))

rFlrThScr.definition: fir(1, epsFlr, epsThScrFir, tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * uThScr * tauBlScrFirU * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE) * exp(-kFir * lai), tFlr, tThScr)
rFlrThScr.formatted definition: ((1) * (epsFlr) * (epsThScrFir) * (tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * uThScr * tauBlScrFirU * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE) * (np.exp(-kFir * lai))) * 5.67e-8 * (((tFlr) + 273.15)**4 - ((tThScr) + 273.15)**4 ))

hCanAir.description: Convection between canopy and air in main compartment

hAirThScr.description: Convection between air in main compartment and thermal screen

hAirOut.description: Convection between air in main compartment and outside air

hAirTop.description: Convection between air in main and top compartment

hThScrTop.description: Convection between thermal screen and air in top compartment

hPipeAir.description: Convection between pipes and air in main compartment

hFlrSo1.definition: sensible(2 / (hFlr / lambdaFlr + hSo1 / lambdaSo), tFlr, tSo1)
hFlrSo1.description: Conduction between floor and soil layer 1

hSo5SoOut.description: Conduction between soil layer 5 and the external soil layer

fThScr.definition: uThScr * kThScr * (abs((tAir - tTop))**0.66) + ((1 - uThScr) / rhoAirMean) * sqrt(0.5 * rhoAirMean * (1 - uThScr) * g * abs(rhoAir - rhoTop))
fThScr.formatted definition: uThScr * kThScr * ((np.abs((tAir - tTop)))**0.66) + ((1 - uThScr) / rhoAirMean) * (np.sqrt(0.5 * rhoAirMean * (1 - uThScr) * g * (np.abs(rhoAir - rhoTop))))
fThScr.reference:
Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.41; De Zwart 1996, Equation 5.68

Note that there is a mistake in Vanthoor: according to De Zwart (1996), Equation 5.68, pg. 91, tOut, rhoOut, should be tTop, rhoTop. There is also a mistake in De Zwart: whenever sqrt is taken, abs should be included

Also note, that rhoAir is used here (see below), and not rhoAirCap which is used in calculating capacities (Eq. 8.24 in Vanthoor 2011). Note that fScr is used here instead of fThScr in Vanthoor.

fScr.description: Air flux through the screens layer (may include multiple screens)

Note that there is a mistake in Vanthoor: according to De Zwart (1996), Equation 5.68, pg. 91, tOut, rhoOut, should be tTop, rhoTop

mcTopOut.description: Vapour flux from top compartment to outside

vecCanAir.description: Vapour transfer coefficient of canopy transpiration
vecCanAir.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.48. Note L is used here instead of DeltaH there

rCanSun.description: Global radiation (PAR+NIR) above the canopy from the sun

rCan.description: Global radiation above and outside the canopy (PAR+NIR, where UV is counted together with NIR)

rfCo2.formatted definition: (((1.5)<(1 + cEvap3 * (etaMgPpm * co2Air - 200)**2))*(1.5) + ((1 + cEvap3 * (etaMgPpm * co2Air - 200)**2)<=(1.5))*(1 + cEvap3 * (etaMgPpm * co2Air - 200)**2))
rfCo2.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.50, and note below "Stanghellini limited the resistance factor for high CO2 levels to 1.5"

rfVp.description: Vapour pressure influence on stomatal resistance
rfVp.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.50, and note below "Stanghellini limited [...] the resistance factor for large vapour pressure differences to 5.8"

sRs.description: Smooth switch between day and night, needed to account for difference in day/night transpiration paramemters

cEvap3.description: Parameter for CO2 influence on stomatal resistance
cEvap3.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.52. Note that the unit there is incorrect. Also note that cEvap3Night there erroneously appears twice.

cEvap4.description: Parameter for vapour pressure influence on stomatal resistance - Canopy Transpiration
cEvap4.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.52. Note that the unit there is incorrect. Also note that cEvap3Night there erroneously appears twice.

hBlowAir.description: Heat flux from direct air heater

mcBlowAir.description: CO2 flux from direct air heater

mvBlowAir.description: Vapour flux from direct air heater

hBoilPipe.description: Heat flux from the boiler to the heating pipe

hIndPipe.description: Heat flux from an industrial source to the heating pipe
hIndPipe.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.56. Note uHeatInd is used here instead of uInd there

hGeoPipe.description: Heat flux from a geothermal source to the heating pipe
hGeoPipe.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.56. Note uHeatGeo is used here instead of uGeo there

hPasAir.description: Heat flux from the buffer to the heating pipe

mvPadAir.description: Vapour flux from the pad and fan to the greenhouse air

fPad.description: Ventilation flux due to the pad and fan system

hPadAir.definition: fPad * (rhoAir * cPAir * tOut - L * rhoAir * (etaPad * (xPad - xOut)))
hPadAir.formatted definition: fPad * (rhoAir * cPAir * tOut - L * rhoAir * (etaPad * (xPad - xOut)))
hPadAir.description: Sensible heat flux from the pad to the greenhouse air

xOut.description: Water vapour content of the outdoor air

hAirOutPad.description: Sensible heat flux from the greenhouse air to the outside air

mvAirOutPad.description: Vapour flux from the greenhouse air to the outside air due to the pad and fan
mvAirOutPad.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.62. Note that this may be a mistake - compare to Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.45

mcPadAir.description: Net CO2 flux from the outside air to the greenhouse due to the pad and fan

hecMechAir.definition: (uMechCool * copMechCool * pMechCool / aFlr) / (tAir - tMechCool + 6.4e-9 * L * (vpAir - satVp(tMechCool)))
hecMechAir.formatted definition: (uMechCool * copMechCool * pMechCool / aFlr) / (tAir - tMechCool + 6.4e-9 * L * (vpAir - (610.78 * np.exp(17.2694 *(tMechCool) / ((tMechCool) + 238.3)))))
hecMechAir.description: Heat exchange coefficinet between the surface of the mechanical cooling unit and the greenhouse air

hMechAir.description: Heat flux from the mechanical cooling to the greenhouse air

mvAirMech.description: Vapour flux from the greenhouse air to the surface of the mechanical cooling system

mvFogAir.description: Vapour flux from the fogging system to the greenhouse air

lAirFog.description: Heat flux of the air needed to evaporate the fog

fVentRoof2.definition: uRoof * aRoof * cD / (2 * aFlr) * sqrt(abs(g * hVent * (tAir - tOut) / (2 * (0.5 * tAir + 0.5 * tOut + 273.15)) + cW * wind**2))
fVentRoof2.formatted definition: uRoof * aRoof * cD / (2 * aFlr) * (np.sqrt((np.abs(g * hVent * (tAir - tOut) / (2 * (0.5 * tAir + 0.5 * tOut + 273.15)) + cW * wind**2))))
fVentRoof2.description: Natural ventilation rate due to roof ventilation

fVentRoofSide2.definition: cD / aFlr * sqrt((aRoofU * aSideU / sqrt(max(aRoofU**2 + aSideU**2, 0.01)))**2 * (2 * g * hSideRoof * (tAir - tOut) / (0.5 * tAir + 0.5 * tOut + 273.15)) + ((aRoofU + aSideU) / 2)**2 * cW * wind**2)
fVentRoofSide2.formatted definition: cD / aFlr * (np.sqrt((aRoofU * aSideU / (np.sqrt((((aRoofU**2 + aSideU**2)>(0.01))*(aRoofU**2 + aSideU**2) + ((0.01)>=(aRoofU**2 + aSideU**2))*(0.01)))))**2 * (2 * g * hSideRoof * (tAir - tOut) / (0.5 * tAir + 0.5 * tOut + 273.15)) + ((aRoofU + aSideU) / 2)**2 * cW * wind**2))
fVentRoofSide2.description: Ventilation rate through roof and side vents
fVentRoofSide2.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.66. A small modification has been added to avoid division by zero

etaInsScr.description: Ventilation reduction factor due to the insect screen
etaInsScr.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.70. Note that the unit there seems to be wrong

fVentRoof.definition: ifElse(etaRoof >= etaRoofThr, etaInsScr * fVentRoof2 + cLeakTop * fLeakage, etaInsScr * (max(uThScr, uBlScr) * fVentRoof2 + (1 - max(uThScr, uBlScr)) * fVentRoofSide2 * etaRoof) + cLeakTop * fLeakage)
fVentRoof.formatted definition: ((etaRoof >= etaRoofThr)*(etaInsScr * fVentRoof2 + cLeakTop * fLeakage) + (1-(etaRoof >= etaRoofThr))*(etaInsScr * ((((uThScr)>(uBlScr))*(uThScr) + ((uBlScr)>=(uThScr))*(uBlScr)) * fVentRoof2 + (1 - (((uThScr)>(uBlScr))*(uThScr) + ((uBlScr)>=(uThScr))*(uBlScr))) * fVentRoofSide2 * etaRoof) + cLeakTop * fLeakage))
fVentRoof.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.72; Katzin 2021, Equation 7.42. The if/else condition from Vanthoor was combined with the equation of Katzin to include the possibility of sidewall ventilation; max(uBlScr, uThScr) is taken, since it is assumed in Vanthoor that the degree of opening of the screen influences how much ventilation comes through the side and roof (fVentRoofSide2) and how much directly through the roof (fVentRoof2)

fVentSide.definition: ifElse(etaRoof >= etaRoofThr, etaInsScr * fVentSide2 + (1 - cLeakTop) * fLeakage, etaInsScr * (max(uThScr, uBlScr) * fVentSide2 + (1 - max(uThScr, uBlScr)) * fVentRoofSide2 * etaSide) + (1 - cLeakTop) * fLeakage)
fVentSide.formatted definition: ((etaRoof >= etaRoofThr)*(etaInsScr * fVentSide2 + (1 - cLeakTop) * fLeakage) + (1-(etaRoof >= etaRoofThr))*(etaInsScr * ((((uThScr)>(uBlScr))*(uThScr) + ((uBlScr)>=(uThScr))*(uBlScr)) * fVentSide2 + (1 - (((uThScr)>(uBlScr))*(uThScr) + ((uBlScr)>=(uThScr))*(uBlScr))) * fVentRoofSide2 * etaSide) + (1 - cLeakTop) * fLeakage))
fVentSide.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.72; Katzin 2021, Equation 7.42. The if/else condition from Vanthoor was combined with the equation of Katzin to include the possibility of sidewall ventilation; max(uBlScr, uThScr) is taken, since it is assumed in Vanthoor that the degree of opening of the screen influences how much ventilation comes through the side and roof (fVentRoofSide2) and how much directly through the roof (fVentRoof2)

etaRoof.description: Fraction of ventilation through roof vents. Override avoids 0/0 when aRoof=aSide=0.

etaSide.description: Fraction of ventilation through side vents. Override avoids 0/0 when aRoof=aSide=0.

fVentForced2.description: Forced ventilation, not including the insect screen

fVentForced.reference: Vanthoor 2011, pg. 225: "The effect of the insect screens on the forced ventilation is determined using Eq. 8.70"

mcExtAir.description: CO2 added to the greenhouse by an external CO2 source

xPad.description: Water vapour content of the pad
xPad.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Table 8.2 (Netherlands) - no pad and fan

mcAirCan.reference:
https://github.com/davkat1/GreenLight/blob/4ec6018e0aad2775ad11085d34f3886a7b7dd052/Code/createGreenLightModel/setGlParams.m

It is assumed that for every mol of CH2O, a mol of CO2 is taken from the air, thus the conversion uses molar masses

co2InPpm.description: CO2 concentration in main compartment - Converted to ppm
co2InPpm.reference: Conversion used in Katzin 2020, see line 884 in https://github.com/davkat1/GreenLight/blob/4ec6018e0aad2775ad11085d34f3886a7b7dd052/Code/createGreenLightModel/setGlAux.m

uBlow.description: Control of forced-air heater. Uses same proportional logic as the boiler (uBoil) since there is no pipe system.

uBoil.description: Control of boiler to pipe rail. Overridden to 0: no boiler or pipes present.

uHeatInd.description: Control of the heat input from an industrial source

uHeatGeo.description: Control of the heat input from geothermal source

uPad.description: Control of the pad and fan

uRoof.description: Roof vent control. Overridden to 0: no roof vents present. Ventilation is handled entirely by uVentForced.

uVentForced.description: Control of exhaust fans. Fans are driven by the same heat/humidity logic used for roof vents (uRoof), since there are no roof vents.

uExtCo2.description: CO2 injection control. Overridden to 0: no CO2 enrichment system present.

uShScr.description: Closure of external shading screen, 0 is open (folded screen), 1 is closed (spread out screen)

uShScrPer.description: Closure of semi-permanent shading screen (whitewash), 0 is open (no whitewash), 1 is closed (whitewash applied)

uThScr.description: Thermal screen control. Overridden to 0: no thermal screen present.

iGlob.description: Outside global radiation from the sun

tSoOut.description: Soil temperature of outer soil layer

vpOut.description: Outdoor air vapour pressure at 20°C and about 70% relative humidity

j.definition: (1 / (2 * theta)) * (jPot + alpha * parCan - sqrt((jPot + alpha * parCan)**2 - 4 * theta * jPot * alpha * parCan))
j.formatted definition: (1 / (2 * theta)) * (jPot + alpha * parCan - (np.sqrt((jPot + alpha * parCan)**2 - 4 * theta * jPot * alpha * parCan)))

jPot.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.15. Note that R is 8.314 in Chapter 9 (Table 9.1) and 8314 in Chapter 8 (Table 8.1)

j25CanMax.description: Maximum rate of electron transport rate at 25°C

co2Stom.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.21. Note that the unit there is equivalent to ppm

gamma.definition: (j25LeafMax / j25CanMax) * cGamma * tCan + 20 * cGamma * (1 - j25LeafMax / j25CanMax)
gamma.formatted definition: (j25LeafMax / j25CanMax) * cGamma * tCan + 20 * cGamma * (1 - j25LeafMax / j25CanMax)
gamma.description: CO2 compensation point, - Canopy photosynthesis, - Canopy photosynthesis
gamma.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.23. Note that the unit there is equivalent to ppm

mcBufFruit.definition: hBufOrg * hTCan * hTCan24 * hTCanSum * gTCan24 * rgFruit
mcBufFruit.formatted definition: hBufOrg * hTCan * hTCan24 * hTCanSum * gTCan24 * rgFruit
mcBufFruit.description: Carbohydrate flow from buffer to fruit

mcBufLeaf.description: Carbohydrate flow from buffer to leaves

mcBufStem.description: Carbohydrate flow from buffer to stems

gTCan24.description: Temperature effect on structural carbon flow to organs

mcBufAir.definition: cLeafG * mcBufLeaf + cStemG * mcBufStem + cFruitG * mcBufFruit
mcBufAir.formatted definition: cLeafG * mcBufLeaf + cStemG * mcBufStem + cFruitG * mcBufFruit

hAirBuf.description: Inhibition due to full carbohydrates buffer
hAirBuf.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.11, Section 9.7.2 Equation B.1, Table 9.2

hBufOrg.description: Inhibition due to insufficient carbohydrates in the buffer
hBufOrg.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.26 and Section 9.7.2 Equation B.1, Table 9.2

hTCan.description: Inhibition of carbohydrate flow to the fruit

hTCan24.description: Inhibition of carbohydrate flow to the organs

hTCanSum.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.27 and Section 9.7.2 Equation B.6, Table 9.2

mcLeafHar.reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 9.47 and Section 9.7.2 Equation B.5. Note that in these references, the last value should be 5e4. But according to the dataset from Katzin 2021 (doi.org/10.4121/13096403), the value used there for the last argument is 1e5.

tauBlScrLayerPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of the blackout screen "layer": the vertical area of the blackout screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)

rhoBlScrLayerPar.description: PAR reflection coefficient of the blackout screen "layer": the vertical area of the blackout screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)

tauCovBlScrPar.definition: tau12(tauCovParVanthoor, tauBlScrLayerPar, rhoCovParVanthoorUp, rhoCovParVanthoorDn, rhoBlScrLayerPar, rhoBlScrLayerPar)
tauCovBlScrPar.description: PAR transmission coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen

rhoCovBlScrParUp.definition: rhoUp(tauCovParVanthoor, tauBlScrLayerPar, rhoCovParVanthoorUp, rhoCovParVanthoorDn, rhoBlScrLayerPar, rhoBlScrLayerPar)
rhoCovBlScrParUp.description: PAR upwards reflection coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen

rhoCovBlScrParDn.definition: rhoDn(tauCovParVanthoor, tauBlScrLayerPar, rhoCovParVanthoorUp, rhoCovParVanthoorDn, rhoBlScrLayerPar, rhoBlScrLayerPar)
rhoCovBlScrParDn.description: PAR downwards reflection coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen

tauBlScrLayerNir.description: NIR transmission coefficient of the blackout screen "layer": the vertical area of the blackout screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
tauBlScrLayerNir.reference: Katzin 2021, part of Equation 7.5; pg. 234 "The optical properties for NIR are calculated analogously"

rhoBlScrLayerNir.description: NIR reflection coefficient of the blackout screen "layer": the vertical area of the blackout screen (whether the screen is deployed or not)
rhoBlScrLayerNir.reference: Katzin 2021, part of Equation 7.5; pg. 234 "The optical properties for NIR are calculated analogously"

tauCovBlScrNir.definition: tau12(tauCovNirVanthoor, tauBlScrLayerNir, rhoCovNirVanthoorUp, rhoCovNirVanthoorDn, rhoBlScrLayerNir, rhoBlScrLayerNir)
tauCovBlScrNir.description: NIR transmission coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
tauCovBlScrNir.reference: Katzin 2021, Equation 7.5; pg. 234 "The optical properties for NIR are calculated analogously"

rhoCovBlScrNirUp.definition: rhoUp(tauCovNirVanthoor, tauBlScrLayerNir, rhoCovNirVanthoorUp, rhoCovNirVanthoorDn, rhoBlScrLayerNir, rhoBlScrLayerNir)
rhoCovBlScrNirUp.description: NIR downwards reflection coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
rhoCovBlScrNirUp.reference: Katzin 2021, Equation 7.5; pg. 234 "The optical properties for NIR are calculated analogously"

rhoCovBlScrNirDn.definition: rhoDn(tauCovNirVanthoor, tauBlScrLayerNir, rhoCovNirVanthoorUp, rhoCovNirVanthoorDn, rhoBlScrLayerNir, rhoBlScrLayerNir)
rhoCovBlScrNirDn.description: NIR downwards reflection coefficient of the cover as in Vanthoor plus the blackout screen
rhoCovBlScrNirDn.reference: Katzin 2021, Equation 7.5; pg. 234 "The optical properties for NIR are calculated analogously"

rParGhLamp.description: PAR above the canopy from the lamps

rParGhIntLamp.description: PAR outside the canopy from the interlights

rParLampCanDown.description: PAR from the lamps directly absorbed by the canopy

rParLampFlrCanUp.definition: rParGhLamp * exp(-k1Par * lai) * rhoFlrPar * (1 - rhoCanPar) * (1 - exp(-k2Par * lai))
rParLampFlrCanUp.description: PAR from the lamps absorbed by the canopy after reflection from the floor

rParLampCan.description: Total PAR from the lamps absorbed by the canopy

rNirLampCan.description: NIR from the lamps absorbed by the canopy

rParLampFlr.description: PAR from the lamps absorbed by the floor

rNirLampFlr.description: NIR from the lamps absorbed by the floor

rLampAir.definition: (etaLampPar + etaLampNir) * qLampIn - rParLampCan - rNirLampCan - rParLampFlr - rNirLampFlr
rLampAir.formatted definition: (etaLampPar + etaLampNir) * qLampIn - rParLampCan - rNirLampCan - rParLampFlr - rNirLampFlr
rLampAir.description: PAR and NIR from the lamps absorbed by the greenhouse air

fIntLampCanPar.definition: 1 - fIntLampDown * exp(-k1IntPar * vIntLampPos * lai) + (fIntLampDown - 1) * exp(-k1IntPar * (1-vIntLampPos) * lai)
fIntLampCanPar.description: Fraction of PAR from the interlights reaching the canopy

fIntLampCanNir.definition: 1 - fIntLampDown * exp(-kIntNir * vIntLampPos * lai) + (fIntLampDown - 1) * exp(-kIntNir * (1 - vIntLampPos) * lai)
fIntLampCanNir.description: Fraction of NIR from the interlights reaching the canopy

rParIntLampCanDown.description: PAR from the interlights directly absorbed by the canopy

rParIntLampFlr.definition: rParGhIntLamp * fIntLampDown * exp(-k1IntPar * vIntLampPos * lai) * (1 - rhoFlrPar)
rParIntLampFlr.description: PAR from the interlights absorbed by the floor

rParIntLampFlrCanUp.definition: rParGhIntLamp * fIntLampDown * rhoFlrPar * (1 - rhoCanPar) * (1 - exp(-k2IntPar * lai)) * exp(-k1IntPar * vIntLampPos * lai)
rParIntLampFlrCanUp.formatted definition: rParGhIntLamp * fIntLampDown * rhoFlrPar * (1 - rhoCanPar) * (1 - (np.exp(-k2IntPar * lai))) * (np.exp(-k1IntPar * vIntLampPos * lai))
rParIntLampFlrCanUp.description: PAR from the interlights absorbed by the canopy after reflection from the floor

rParIntLampCan.description: Total PAR from the interlights absorbed by the canopy

rNirIntLampCan.description: NIR from the interlights absorbed by the canopy

rNirIntLampFlr.definition: etaIntLampNir * qIntLampIn * fIntLampDown * (1 - rhoFlrNir) * exp(-kIntNir * vIntLampPos * lai)
rNirIntLampFlr.formatted definition: etaIntLampNir * qIntLampIn * fIntLampDown * (1 - rhoFlrNir) * (np.exp(-kIntNir * vIntLampPos * lai))
rNirIntLampFlr.description: NIR from the interlights absorbed by the floor

rIntLampAir.definition: (etaIntLampPar + etaIntLampNir) * qIntLampIn - rParIntLampCan - rNirIntLampCan - rParIntLampFlr - rNirIntLampFlr
rIntLampAir.formatted definition: (etaIntLampPar + etaIntLampNir) * qIntLampIn - rParIntLampCan - rNirIntLampCan - rParIntLampFlr - rNirIntLampFlr
rIntLampAir.description: PAR and NIR from the interlights absorbed by the greenhouse air

rCanLamp.description: Shortwave radiation above the canopy from the lamps (PAR+NIR, where UV is counted together with NIR)

rCanIntLamp.description: Shortwave radiation outside the canopy from the interlight lamps (PAR+NIR, where UV is counted together with NIR)

fIntLampCanUp.description: Fraction of radiation going up from the interlights to the canopy

fIntLampCanDown.description: Fraction of radiation going down from the interlights to the canopy

tauBlScrFirU.description: FIR transmission coefficient of the blackout screen
tauBlScrFirU.reference: Following Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.39. Note that Fir here is used instead of TIR

rLampSky.definition: fir(aLamp, epsLampTop, epsSky, tauCovFir*tauThScrFirU*tauBlScrFirU, tLamp, tSky)

rLampCovIn.definition: fir(aLamp, epsLampTop, epsCovFir, tauThScrFirU*tauBlScrFirU, tLamp, tCovIn)

rLampThScr.definition: fir(aLamp, epsLampTop, epsThScrFir, uThScr*tauBlScrFirU, tLamp, tThScr)
rLampThScr.description: FIR between lamps and thermal screen

rLampBlScr.definition: fir(aLamp, epsLampTop, epsBlScrFir, uBlScr, tLamp, tBlScr)
rLampBlScr.description: FIR between lamps and blackout screen

rFirLampCan.definition: fir(aLamp, epsLampBottom, epsCan, aCan, tLamp, tCan)

rLampPipe.definition: fir(aLamp, epsLampBottom, epsPipe, tauIntLampFir * 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE * exp(-kFir * lai), tLamp, tPipe)

rFirLampFlr.definition: fir(aLamp, epsLampBottom, epsFlr, tauIntLampFir * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE) * exp(-kFir * lai), tLamp, tFlr)

rGroPipeCan.description: FIR between grow pipes and canopy

rBlScrSky.definition: fir(uBlScr, epsBlScrFir, epsSky, tauCovFir * tauThScrFirU, tBlScr, tSky)
rBlScrSky.description: FIR between blackout screen and sky

rBlScrCovIn.definition: fir(uBlScr, epsBlScrFir, epsCovFir, tauThScrFirU, tBlScr, tCovIn)
rBlScrCovIn.description: FIR between blackout screen and cover

rBlScrThScr.definition: fir(uBlScr, epsBlScrFir, epsThScrFir, uThScr, tBlScr, tThScr)
rBlScrThScr.description: FIR between blackout screen and thermal screen

rCanBlScr.definition: fir(aCan, epsCan, epsBlScrFir, tauLampFir * uBlScr, tCan, tBlScr)
rCanBlScr.description: FIR between canopy and blackout screen

rPipeBlScr.definition: fir(aPipe, epsPipe, epsBlScrFir, tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * uBlScr * 0.49 * exp(-kFir * lai), tPipe, tBlScr)
rPipeBlScr.description: FIR between blackout screen and pipe

rFlrBlScr.definition: fir(1, epsFlr, epsBlScrFir, tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * uBlScr * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE) * exp(-kFir * lai), tFlr, tBlScr)
rFlrBlScr.formatted definition: ((1) * (epsFlr) * (epsBlScrFir) * (tauIntLampFir * tauLampFir * uBlScr * (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE) * (np.exp(-kFir * lai))) * 5.67e-8 * (((tFlr) + 273.15)**4 - ((tBlScr) + 273.15)**4 ))
rFlrBlScr.description: FIR between blackout screen and floor

rIntLampSky.definition: fir(aIntLamp, epsIntLamp, epsSky, tauCovFir * tauThScrFirU * tauBlScrFirU * tauLampFir * (1 - fIntLampCanUp), tIntLamp, tSky)

rIntLampCovIn.definition: fir(aIntLamp, epsIntLamp, epsCovFir, tauThScrFirU * tauBlScrFirU * tauLampFir * (1 - fIntLampCanUp), tIntLamp, tCovIn)

rIntLampThScr.definition: fir(aIntLamp, epsIntLamp, epsThScrFir, uThScr * tauBlScrFirU * tauLampFir * (1 - fIntLampCanUp), tIntLamp, tThScr)
rIntLampThScr.description: FIR between interlights and thermal screen

rIntLampBlScr.definition: fir(aIntLamp, epsIntLamp, epsBlScrFir, uBlScr * tauLampFir * (1 - fIntLampCanUp), tIntLamp, tBlScr)
rIntLampBlScr.description: FIR between interlights and blackout screen

rIntLampLamp.definition: fir(aIntLamp, epsIntLamp, epsLampBottom, (1-fIntLampCanUp) * aLamp, tIntLamp, tLamp)

rFirIntLampCan.definition: fir(aIntLamp, epsIntLamp, epsCan, fIntLampCanDown + fIntLampCanUp, tIntLamp, tCan)

rIntLampPipe.definition: fir(aIntLamp, epsIntLamp, epsPipe, 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE * (1-fIntLampCanDown), tIntLamp, tPipe)

rFirIntLampFlr.definition: fir(aIntLamp, epsIntLamp, epsFlr, (1 - 0.49 * pi * lPipe * phiPipeE) * (1 - fIntLampCanDown), tIntLamp, tFlr)

hAirBlScr.definition: sensible(1.7 * uBlScr * abs(tAir - tBlScr)**0.33, tAir, tBlScr)
hAirBlScr.description: Convective heat exchange between air in main compartment (below the screens) and blackout screen

hLampAir.description: Convective heat exchange between top lamps and air in main compartment

hIntLampAir.description: Convective heat exchange between interlights and air in main compartment

hGroPipeAir.definition: sensible(1.99 * pi * phiGroPipeE * lGroPipe * (abs(tGroPipe - tAir))**0.32, tGroPipe, tAir)
hGroPipeAir.description: Convective heat exchange between grow pipes and air in main compartment
hGroPipeAir.reference: Katzin 2021, Equations 7.31, 7.33; Vanthoor 2011, Table 8.4. Note there is a mistake in Katzin 2021.

hBlScrTop.definition: sensible(1.7 * uBlScr * abs(tBlScr - tTop)**0.33, tBlScr, tTop)
hBlScrTop.description: Convective heat exchange between air in top compartment (above the screens) and blackout screen

hBoilGroPipe.description: Heat from boiler to grow pipes

fBlScr.definition: uBlScr * kBlScr * (abs((tAir - tTop))**0.66) + ((1 - uBlScr) / rhoAirMean) * sqrt(0.5 * rhoAirMean * (1 - uBlScr) * g * abs(rhoAir - rhoTop))
fBlScr.formatted definition: uBlScr * kBlScr * ((np.abs((tAir - tTop)))**0.66) + ((1 - uBlScr) / rhoAirMean) * (np.sqrt(0.5 * rhoAirMean * (1 - uBlScr) * g * (np.abs(rhoAir - rhoTop))))

mvAirBlScr.definition: max(0, cond(1.7 * uBlScr * abs(tAir - tBlScr)**0.33, vpAir, satVp(tBlScr)))
mvAirBlScr.description: Condensation from main compartment on blackout screen

lAirBlScr.description: Latent heat flux by condensation on blackout screen

hAirMech.description: Heat flux from the mechanical cooling to the greenhouse air

mvMechAir.description: Vapour flux from the greenhouse air to the surface of the mechanical cooling system

hBufHotPipe.description: Energy from the hot buffer to the heating pipes

tauLampFir.description: Transmissivity of toplight lamp layer to FIR

isDayInside.description: Indicates whether daytime climate settings should be used, i.e., if the sun is out or the lamps are on

heatSetPoint.definition: isDayInside * tSpDay + (1 - isDayInside) * tSpNight + heatCorrection * lampNoCons
heatSetPoint.formatted definition: isDayInside * tSpDay + (1 - isDayInside) * tSpNight + heatCorrection * lampNoCons

uBoilGro.description: Control of boiler to grow pipes. Overridden to 0: no grow pipes present.

heatMax.description: Ventilation setpoint due to excess heating set point

ventHeat.description: Ventilation due to excess heat, 0 means vents are closed

rhIn.description: Relative humidity of the indoor air

ventRh.reference: Katzin 2021, pg. 119; pg. 156-157: The setpoint of when to start ventilating depends on the mechanical dehumidification, if it is on (mechAllowed == 1), start ventilating only when mechanical dehumidification is at full capacity. If it is off (mechAllowed == 0), start at the normal setpoint

ventCold.description: Ventilation closure due to too cold temperatures

thScrSp.description: Setpoint for closing the thermal screen

thScrCold.description: Closure of the thermal screen based on outdoor temperature

thScrRh.formatted definition: (((((1) + ((0) - (1)) * (1 / (1 + np.exp(-2 / (thScrRhPband) * np.log(100) * ((rhIn) - (rhMax + thScrMaxRh) - (thScrRhPband) / 2))))))>(1 - ventCold))*(((1) + ((0) - (1)) * (1 / (1 + np.exp(-2 / (thScrRhPband) * np.log(100) * ((rhIn) - (rhMax + thScrMaxRh) - (thScrRhPband) / 2)))))) + ((1 - ventCold)>=(((1) + ((0) - (1)) * (1 / (1 + np.exp(-2 / (thScrRhPband) * np.log(100) * ((rhIn) - (rhMax + thScrMaxRh) - (thScrRhPband) / 2)))))))*(1 - ventCold))
thScrRh.description: Opening of thermal screen due to high humidity
thScrRh.reference: Katzin 2021, pg. 119. Note that if ventCold == 0 (it's too cold inside to ventilate), the screen will not open - better to reduce RH by increasing temperature

thScrHeat.description: Opening of thermal screen closure due to too high temperatures

uBlScr.description: Closure of blackout screen, 0 is open (folded screen), 1 is closed (spread out screen)

lampTimeOfDay.definition: ifElse(lampTimeOn <= lampTimeOff, logical_and(lampTimeOn < timeOfDay, timeOfDay < lampTimeOff), logical_or(lampTimeOn < timeOfDay, timeOfDay < lampTimeOff))
lampTimeOfDay.formatted definition: ((lampTimeOn <= lampTimeOff)*((np.logical_and(lampTimeOn < timeOfDay, timeOfDay < lampTimeOff))) + (1-(lampTimeOn <= lampTimeOff))*((np.logical_or(lampTimeOn < timeOfDay, timeOfDay < lampTimeOff))))
lampTimeOfDay.description: Control of the lamp according to the time of day
lampTimeOfDay.reference: If lampTimeOn < lampTimeOff, lamps are on from lampTimeOn to lampTimeOff each day, if lampTimeOn > lampTimeOff, lamps are on from lampTimeOn until lampTimeOff the next day, if lampTimeOn == lampTimeOff, lamps are always off. For continuous light, set lampTimeOn = -1, lampTimeOff = 25

lampDayOfYear.definition: ifElse(dayLampStart <= dayLampStop, logical_and(dayLampStart < dayOfYear, dayOfYear < dayLampStop), logical_or(dayLampStart < dayOfYear, dayOfYear < dayLampStop))
lampDayOfYear.formatted definition: ((dayLampStart <= dayLampStop)*((np.logical_and(dayLampStart < dayOfYear, dayOfYear < dayLampStop))) + (1-(dayLampStart <= dayLampStop))*((np.logical_or(dayLampStart < dayOfYear, dayOfYear < dayLampStop))))
lampDayOfYear.description: Control of the lamp according to the day of year
lampDayOfYear.reference: If dayLampStart < dayLampStop, lamps are on from dayLampStart to dayLampStop, if dayLampStart > dayLampStop, lamps are on from lampTimeOn until lampTimeOff the next year, if dayLampStart == dayLampStop, lamps are always off. For no influence of day of year, set dayLampStart = -1, dayLampStop > 366

lampNoCons.description: Control for the lamps disregarding temperature and humidity constraints
lampNoCons.reference: This variable is used to decide if the greenhouse is in the light period, needed to set the climate setpoints. However, the lamps may be switched off if it is too hot or too humid in the greenhouse. In this case, the greenhouse is still considered to be in the light period

linearLampSwitchOn.formatted definition: (((0)>((((1)<(timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1))*(1) + ((timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1)<=(1))*(timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1))))*(0) + (((((1)<(timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1))*(1) + ((timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1)<=(1))*(timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1)))>=(0))*((((1)<(timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1))*(1) + ((timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1)<=(1))*(timeOfDay - lampTimeOn + 1))))
linearLampSwitchOn.description: Linear version of lamp switch on
linearLampSwitchOn.reference: Value of 1 at lampTimeOn, 0 one hour before lampTimeOn, with linear transition between the two

linearLampSwitchOff.formatted definition: (((0)>((((1)<(lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1))*(1) + ((lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1)<=(1))*(lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1))))*(0) + (((((1)<(lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1))*(1) + ((lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1)<=(1))*(lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1)))>=(0))*((((1)<(lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1))*(1) + ((lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1)<=(1))*(lampTimeOff - timeOfDay + 1))))
linearLampSwitchOff.description: Linear version of lamp switching off
linearLampSwitchOff.reference: Value of 0 at lampOff, 0 one hour after lampOff, with linear transition between these values

linearLampBothSwitches.definition: (lampTimeOn != lampTimeOff) * ifElse(lampTimeOn < lampTimeOff, min(linearLampSwitchOn, linearLampSwitchOff),  max(linearLampSwitchOn, linearLampSwitchOff))
linearLampBothSwitches.description: Linear transition between lamp on and lamp off
linearLampBothSwitches.reference: Combination of linear transitions above, if lampTimeOn < lampTimeOff, take the minimum of the above, if lampTimeOn > lampTimeOff, take the maximum, if lampTimeOn == lampTimeOff, set at 0

smoothLamp.description: Smooth (linear) approximation of the lamp control
smoothLamp.reference: Allows smooth transition between light period and dark period setpoints, 1 when lamps are on, 0 when lamps are off, with a linear interpolation in between. Does not take into account the lamp switching off due to instantaenous sun radiation, excess heat or humidity

uLamp.definition: lampNoCons * proportionalControl(tAir, heatMax + lampExtraHeat, -0.5, 0, 1) * (isDaySmooth + (1 - isDaySmooth) * max(proportionalControl(rhIn, rhMax + blScrExtraRh, -0.5, 0, 1), 1 - ventCold))
uLamp.description: Control for the top lights, 1 if lamps are on, 0 if lamps are off

uIntLamp.description: Control for the interlights, 1 if interlights are on, 0 if interlights are off
uIntLamp.reference: Assuming control of interlights is equal to toplights

mechAllowed.description: Decision on whether mechanical cooling and dehumidification is allowed to work
mechAllowed.reference: Assuming no mechanical cooling and dehumidification

hotBufAllowed.description: Decision on whether heating from buffer is allowed to run
hotBufAllowed.reference: Assuming no heating from the buffer

isDay.description: Indicates whether it is day outside. 1 is day, 0 is night.

isDaySmooth.description: Indicates whether it is day outside, with a smooth transition between day and night

dayRadSum.description: Daily radiation sum of outdoor solar global radiation

tau12(tau1, tau2, rho1Up, rho1Dn, rho2Up.description: Transmission coefficient of a double layer, modified according to Katzin 2020, Equation A4. The unused arguments (rho1Up, rho2Dn) are included so that calls to tau12, rhoUp, rhoDn all have the same arguments. 1 is the top layer and 2 the bottom

rhoUp(tau1, tau2, rho1Up, rho1Dn, rho2Up.description: Upwards reflection coefficient of a double layer, modified according to Katzin 2020, Equation A5. The unused arguments (tau2, rho2Dn) are included so that calls to tau12, rhoUp, rhoDn all have the same arguments. 1 is the top layer and 2 the bottom

rhoDn(tau1, tau2, rho1Up, rho1Dn, rho2Up.description: Downward reflection coefficient of a double layer, modified according to Katzin 2020, Equation A6. The unused arguments (tau1, rho1Up) are included so that calls to tau12, rhoUp, rhoDn all have the same arguments. 1 is the top layer and 2 the bottom

fir(a1, eps1, eps2, f12, t1, t2).description: Net far infrared flux from 1 to 2

sensible(hec, t1, t2).description: Convection or conduction from object 1 to object 2
sensible(hec, t1, t2).reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.40. Note that abs of hec is taken to ensure that heat flow is always from 1 to 2

cond(hec, vp1, vp2).description: Vapour flux from the air to an object by condensation
cond(hec, vp1, vp2).reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.44. Note that according to Vanthoor Table 8.1 (pg. 232), sMV12 is -0.1

airMv(f12, vp1, vp2, t1, t2).description: Vapour flux accompanying an air flux
airMv(f12, vp1, vp2, t1, t2).reference: Vanthoor 2011, Equation 8.45. Note that according to Table 8.1 (pg. 232), mWater is 18 and R is 8314. Also note that abs(f12) is taken so that the vapour flux is always from high vapour to low vapour

satVp(temp).description: Saturated vapour pressure (Pa) at temperature temp (°C)

airMc(f12, c1, c2).description: CO2 flux accompanying an air flux

co2dens2ppm(temp, dens).description: Convert CO2 density (kg m^{-3}) to molar concentration (ppm); pressure is assumed to be 1 atm
co2dens2ppm(temp, dens).reference: Calculation based on ideal gas law pV=nRT, used in Katzin 2020, see https://github.com/davkat1/GreenLight/blob/4ec6018e0aad2775ad11085d34f3886a7b7dd052/Code/serviceFunctions/co2dens2ppm.m

min(a,b).description: Minimum of two variables, defined here so it will work regardless of solver used

max(a,b).description: Maximum of two variables, defined here so it will work regardless of solver used

smoothHar(processVar, cutOff, smooth, ma.description: Smooth function for harvesting (leaves, fruit, etc); processVar - the variable to be controlled; cutoff - the value at which the processVar should be harvested; smooth - smoothing factor. The rate will go from 0 to maxRate at a range with approximately this width; maxRate - the maximum harvest rate

proportionalControl(processVar, setPt, p.definition: min_val + (max_val - min_val) * (1 / (1 + exp(-2 / pBand * log(100) * (processVar - setPt - pBand / 2))))
proportionalControl(processVar, setPt, p.description: Smooth proportional controller steering processVar towards setPt
